_comment: Item Properties: Flame Dragon Core. Per physical-size directive: every object has lore-accurate physical size, not block size. Length: 0.3 m, Weight: 50 jin, Material: condensed fire-essence, Suitable realm: Spirit Severing, Body strength required: Nascent Soul. Prime Directive: physical size exists objectively; cultivation determines what the player can lift/activate.
name: Flame Dragon Core

usage_requirements.effect_when_undersized: Can hold but cannot absorb; core burns the holder.

simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required body strength will be able to lift/activate the item; the item does not change, only the cultivator does.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This reflects the novels: Wang Lin could not lift the God-Slaying Sword until his body cultivation matched; he could barely use it as a heavy physical weapon before then.
